classifieds_62.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to identify the most expensive video game item. After performing the search, the agent did not sort the results by price or thoroughly scan all available listings to find the highest-priced item. Instead, it selected one of the Spiderman-related items without confirming it was the most expensive.
classifieds_62.REFLECTION: When the objective requires finding the "most expensive" item, always prioritize sorting search results by price from high to low if such an option is available. If not, carefully scan all listings on the search results page to identify the item with the highest price before navigating to its page.
classifieds_62.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The agent failed to identify the most expensive video game item. After performing the search, the agent did not sort the results by price or thoroughly scan all available listings to find the highest-priced item. Instead, it selected one of the Spiderman-related items without confirming it was the most expensive.

REFLECTION:
When the objective requires finding the "most expensive" item, always prioritize sorting search results by price from high to low if such an option is available. If not, carefully scan all listings on the search results page to identify the item with the highest price before navigating to its page.
